title: Crimsoncraft
description: A curated modpack that offers new, novel experiences in the world of minecraft while keeping a Vanilla feel.
body:
![Quad screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a877826af450aee9bb2a53d3c6b7a6fabc13c00_0.webp)

**A modpack made for exploration, crafting, and building. This pack offers new mobs, new structures, new biomes, new food, and new contraptions, with a host of QoL improvements, optimizations, and building utilities thrown in. This pack adds a ton of new experiences for the player without sacrificing what makes Minecraft special, and is designed to be pick up and play, while leaving plenty to sink your teeth into the more technical aspects of the pack for seasoned players.**


<details>
<summary>Laundry List for 1.3 Version</summary>
  
Currently, work is underway for a 1.3 version of Crimsoncraft. This will include somewhat of a pack overhaul, with special attention paid to pack cohesion. For now, that list is as follows:

- Implement Recipe Stacks for EMI
- Replace Farmer’s Delight with Let’s Do
- Recipe Parity
- Texture Pack Patch(es)
- Investigate ReDeco issues
- Pare down furniture mods
- Potentially Remove Every Compat, Vertical Slabs, and More Slabs and Stairs (Copycat mod is a more lightweight mod that gives the same visual effects)
- Make a streamlined Default Config
- Custom Loading Screen
- Custom Textures
- Add hints in loading screens and find other ways to prompt players towards more esoteric gameplay.

</details>



Special thanks to Neon_Zephyr, Metalmint, and Darkmatter!
